content: The performance gap between intrinsic curiosity modules (ICM), random network distillation (RND), and hand-designed curious agents can be closed by integrating 2024-2025 SOTA active learning episodic memory architectures, where the agent adaptively prunes and weights past surprising experiences to refine intrinsic reward calculation instead of weighting all novelty equally.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
trigger_topic: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
